title: Filter syntax probe: high-priority, not-done tasks due soon
description: Ergonomics probe for the Vikunja filter query language (docs/API_NOTES.md's 'Filter Implementation Notes'): sets up mixed data, then asks the agent to narrow it down with a filter expression rather than fetching everything and filtering client-side.
promptTemplate: Create a project called "{{prefix}}Filter Probe" with 6 tasks: three called "{{prefix}}urgent-N" (N=1..3) with priority 5, due in 3 days, and three called "{{prefix}}later-N" (N=1..3) with priority 1, due in 60 days. Then use a filter query (not manual inspection) to find just the not-done tasks with priority 4 or higher, due within the next 14 days, and tell me their titles.
